problems.label: I forgot my password
problems.answer: On the login screen, tap "Forgot password" and enter the email linked to your account. Check your inbox (and spam folder) for a reset link. The link expires after 24 hours — request a new one if needed.

problems.label: How do I change my email?
problems.answer: Go to Profile(top left corner) → Edit → Edit email and password, enter your new address, and confirm via the verification email we send.

problems.label: How do I delete my account?
problems.answer: Go to Profile(top left corner) → Edit → Delete account — this permanently removes your profile and data and cannot be undone. If you cannot access Settings, submit an issue report and our support team will help.

problems.label: I’m not receiving email notifications
problems.answer: Check that notifications are enabled in Settings → Notifications and in your device system settings for this app. If you recently reinstalled, open the app once and allow notifications when prompted.

problems.label: Cannot upload screenshots
problems.answer: Check that you have enabled the permission to access your device's storage in device settings. Try a stable Wi‑Fi or cellular connection, force-close and reopen the app, then clear the app cache if available on your device. If the issue continues on a good connection, submit an issue report with your device model and OS version.

problems.label: Cannot start a new lesson / My Start next lesson button is disabled
problems.answer: Please leave us an issue report with details like current lesson, device model, and OS version.

problems.label: Cannot start a meeting / Start meeting isn’t working
problems.answer: This usually needs our support team. Please describe what happens when you try to start the meeting (and include device model and OS version).

problems.label: Meeting is not unlocked
problems.answer: If a meeting should be unlocked but isn’t, our support team needs to check your account. Please describe which meeting and what you see on screen.

problems.label: Lesson is not unlocked
problems.answer: If a lesson should be unlocked but isn’t, our support team needs to check your account. Please describe which lesson and what you see on screen.

problems.label: I don’t have a lesson in progress, but the app shows one
problems.answer: This status glitch needs a support ticket. Please describe what the app shows versus what you expect (include screenshots details if you can).

problems.label: I don’t have a meeting in progress, but the app shows one
problems.answer: This status glitch needs a support ticket. Please describe what the app shows versus what you expect (include screenshots details if you can).
